mvp_definition: The complete architecture-governance loop live end to end (topic intake to backlog, agenda, meeting, minutes, voting, decision, ADR, action, risk, dependency) for one committee, with role+ABAC authorization, immutable hash-chained audit, in-app notifications, bilingual EN/AR + RTL, and basic dashboards.

invariants.statement: Do not replace the approved stack (.NET 8 / ASP.NET Core / EF Core / SQL Server / React + TypeScript / Vite) without a new ADR.
Modular monolith only — no microservices, brokers, service mesh, Kubernetes, or a second database without a measured need recorded in an ADR.
Self-contained (CON-001) — no dependency on org runtime infra; ACMP bundles all runtime deps incl. self-hosted Keycloak + SQL Server; only external dep is Webex (Phase 2).
No endpoint or command bypasses policy-based authorization (role + ABAC); enforce least privilege and segregation of duties.
Every state change emits an AuditEvent; votes, issued decisions, approved ADRs, and published minutes are immutable (superseded, never edited); hash-chain votes/decisions/audit.
AI-extracted content is candidate-only until a human approves it; treat transcripts/briefs as untrusted input (OWASP LLM01).
No secrets in source control; use externalized config + Docker secrets / git-ignored .env.
No feature without unit + integration tests and a satisfied AC-###.
No hardcoded user-facing strings — everything via i18n (EN + AR); every screen renders correctly in RTL; Gregorian dates.
Do not duplicate Tarseem (diagrams, JSON spec = source of truth) or Keystone (research) functionality without a documented ADR.
Do not mask assumptions or open decisions; record inferences as ASM-### and unresolved decisions as OQ-###, never silently deciding a flagged item.
Do not overengineer — right-size for an on-prem, low-traffic, ≤20-user internal tool.
No commits direct to main; every slice ships on a short-lived branch → PR → green CI → review → squash-merge, keeping main green and deployable.
No UI drift from the reference design — any screen with a matching .dc.html matches it exactly; no-reference screens compose from the design system + IA spec and are flagged.

phases.goal: Discovery & validation — eliminate blockers before code; complete the planning package.
phases.exit_criteria: All PH-1-blocking OQ- resolved or defaulted; validator gates green; environments accessible. Status: complete.

phases.goal: MVP governance — the complete governance loop live end to end with identity, audit, notifications, EN/AR+RTL, and basic dashboards.
phases.exit_criteria: All Must FRs implemented, tested, signed off; zero Sev-1; one full meeting cycle on the platform; staging stable. Status: complete.

phases.goal: Governance expansion — ADRs + Invariants, risks/dependencies + impact graph, reporting, Webex adapter, Tarseem sidecar, Knowledge/Research.
phases.exit_criteria: Should FRs signed off; Tarseem sidecar and Webex adapter stable; zero Sev-1. Status: substantially delivered (P10/P11/P12 shipped); Webex/Tarseem/Knowledge remainder outstanding.

phases.goal: Research & knowledge — AI-assisted transcript extraction (candidate-only, human-reviewed), email channel, KPI dashboard, traceability export.
phases.exit_criteria: Committed Could FRs implemented + tested; AI off by default; privacy review signed off. Status: not started.
